files.00_Overview.md: This is the gateway document. Keep as high-level entry point but: 1) Add Learning Objectives section, 2) Strengthen the 'What' (concise definition), 3) Keep model comparison table but move detailed equations to 02_Specific_Models.md, 4) Add Key Takeaways summary block, 5) Link forward to detailed theory documents
files.01_Fundamental_Theory.md: Significant redundancy with 00_Overview. REFACTOR to: 1) Focus purely on theoretical derivation (start from first principles), 2) Deepen mathematical formulation section with proper derivations, 3) Add 'Why' section explaining physical mechanisms, 4) Expand Stokes number analysis with regime diagrams, 5) Add Learning Objectives specific to theory mastery, 6) Remove duplication of basic info covered in Overview, 7) Add derivation of dispersion coefficient from turbulence kinetic energy
files.02_Specific_Models.md: Contains duplicate content from 00_Overview. REFACTOR to: 1) Start with 'Why different models exist' (historical context), 2) Each model should follow structure: Formulation → Assumptions → When to Use → Limitations, 3) Add model selection decision tree, 4) Add 'How to tune' practical guidance, 5) Add inter-model comparison table highlighting key differences, 6) Add case study examples showing when to choose each model, 7) Remove redundant basic equations covered in Overview and Theory

global_strategy: This folder shows classic fragmentation: Overview duplicates Fundamental Theory, and Specific Models repeats both. Apply clear 3W separation: 00_Overview = 'What' (quick start with model selection guidance), 01_Fundamental_Theory = 'Why' (derivation from first principles + physical mechanism), 02_Specific_Models = 'How' (implementation details + model selection + tuning). Add missing Learning Objectives to all files. Add Key Takeaways to Overview. Remove all redundant content - each concept should live in ONE primary location with links from others. Consider adding 03_Implementation_and_Tuning.md for practical OpenFOAM setup details if depth needed.
